widget.name: AMO Docs
widget.short_description: Create documents from templates in the lead card
widget.description: Generate documents from templates using deal, contact and company data. Set your backend URL in settings.
widget.tour_description: Documents appear in the lead card sidebar. Click «+ Create», pick a template — the file is generated and downloaded.

settings.backend_url: Backend URL (same API base if your manifest uses backend_url)
